category_sources: Official autossh homepage describes monitoring and restarting ssh as necessary.
source_facts.description says autossh automatically restarts SSH sessions and tunnels.
docs_sources: Official README documents build, usage, options, monitoring, and environment variables.
Official autossh homepage says to read README for documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official homepage provides a source tarball but no official source-control repository URL.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes connection monitoring and automatic restart behavior.
source_facts.description identifies SSH sessions and tunnels.
